command: node atm.mjs tasks scope add --task TASK-AAO-0035 --actor codex-gpt-5.4-mini --add "packages/cli/src/commands/tasks.ts,scripts/validate-governance-commands.ts,tests/cli/git-commit-task-scoped-staging.test.ts" --class linked-surface --phase during-implementation --reason "While converging TASK-AAO-0035, the governed closeout lane exposed task-scoped staging and governance-validator drift that directly blocked the help-surface delivery from landing. amendmentMetadata.reason: While converging TASK-AAO-0035, the governed closeout lane exposed task-scoped staging and governance-validator drift that directly blocked the help-surface delivery from landing. These files are part of the same closeout contract, not an unrelated feature branch.
